name: agent-skills
description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents, extended for Apple-platform development.

interface.shortDescription: Production engineering workflows with Apple-platform support.
interface.longDescription: Reusable spec, planning, implementation, testing, review, security, performance, and shipping skills for Codex, extended with iOS, macOS, SwiftUI, Swift concurrency, SwiftData, and App Store Connect workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent Skills to define this feature with a spec first.
Use Agent Skills to build the next task with tests and verification.
Use Agent Skills to review this change before shipping.
